lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. It has some mechanical wear and minor cosmetic issues. The exterior has some scratches and small dents, and the interior shows signs of use.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It requires significant mechanical repairs and shows heavy wear on both the interior and exterior. It is not currently in reliable running order.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves well as a functional daily driver, though its age is apparent. Mechanically, the car is reliable for daily commutes, though there is a minor oil leak that will need monitoring and the suspension is beginning to show some wear over bumps. The interior has some visible staining and wear on the upholstery, and the exterior has a few minor dings and scratches consistent with regular use. However, all essential electronics work, and it remains a solid option for someone needing dependable transportation.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior shows heavy wear, including several large dents, noticeable rust on the door panels and wheel wells, and severely faded paint with clear coat failure. Mechanically, the engine starts but runs roughly, and the transmission is showing signs of slipping. The interior is also in rough shape, with torn upholstery and a non-functional climate control system. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited as a project car or for parts.

Looking for a reliable companion for your daily commutes? This car is a solid choice! While it shows some character through its honest wear and tear, it remains a functional and steady vehicle that’s ready for many more miles. It's a great opportunity for anyone needing a dependable ride at a fair price!

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom condition, it features an immaculate exterior and a flawless cabin that reflects a history of meticulous care. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been preserved to an exemplary standard, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original release. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty—it's in absolutely stunning condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this car since day one, so it's super clean and drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new without the new-car price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you're going to love it!

This 996-generation Carrera 4S represents a pinnacle of analog feedback and mechanical refinement. Powered by the M96/03 3.6L flat-six with VarioCam Plus, the engine pulls linearly through the rev range, benefiting from a documented IMS bearing upgrade and a recent borescope inspection showing zero cylinder bore scoring. The Getrag G96/31 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile, short-throw engagement, channeling torque through a viscous-coupling all-wheel-drive system. The wide-body chassis remains structurally rigid, featuring an upgraded Bilstein PSS10 coilover setup for enhanced damping and corner-exit stability. Rolling on staggered 18-inch Turbo Twist alloys wrapped in fresh Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber, the braking system utilizes ventilated and cross-drilled rotors with four-piston monobloc calipers for exceptional thermal management. This is a collector-grade example with a pristine undercarriage and factory-spec tolerances throughout.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No scratches or mechanical issues. Maintenance records included.

This exceptional vehicle is a true time capsule, preserved in showroom state since day one. The exterior finish is deep and mirror-like, protected by a professional ceramic coating with absolutely zero rock chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather is soft and matte, the buttons show no signs of use, and it still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a comprehensive folder of records to prove its pampered life. Always garage-kept under a soft cover and never driven in inclement weather, this car represents the absolute pinnacle of its model for a discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a flawless driving experience.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in pristine, original state. Meticulously preserved and mechanically beyond reproach, this vehicle offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. An acquisition of this caliber is a rare opportunity to secure a benchmark-quality asset.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in absolute showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects a standard of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically superior, this vehicle offers an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast. Every detail has been rigorously scrutinized to ensure it meets our exacting standards for excellence.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in stunning, like-new condition—honestly, you'd think it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been meticulously cared for, kept in a garage, and drives like an absolute dream. I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to fall in love with it just like I did. Feel free to reach out if you want to come see this beauty in person!

Presenting a collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in concours condition. This example features the S54B32 high-revving inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and a meticulously maintained dual-VANOS variable valve timing system. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis has received proactive subframe reinforcement, and the rod bearings have been serviced to ensure mechanical integrity. Suspension bushings and dampers retain factory-spec compliance, providing the precise turn-in and lateral stability synonymous with the M-division's engineering. With consistent compression across all cylinders and a flawless underbody, this vehicle represents a turnkey acquisition for the serious enthusiast.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Full service history included. Firm price.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained in showroom condition since day one. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips or swirl marks, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and the interior still carries that new-car aroma. Mechanically, it is flawless, having been strictly garage-kept and serviced exclusively at the dealership with a comprehensive log included. Every button, dial, and feature functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. This is a rare opportunity to own a virtually new example of a modern classic.

We are pleased to present this superlative specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with a pristine cabin, effectively mirroring its original showroom delivery state. A rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished provenance and peerless condition.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, representing the pinnacle of its class. Meticulously maintained to an exacting standard, this specimen exhibits no discernible wear, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original showroom state. Its mechanical integrity is absolute, and its aesthetic presentation remains flawless. This represents a premier opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled caliber.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garage-parked, and it’s spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for total perfection, this is the one. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E92 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S65 V8 era, featuring individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. This collector-grade specimen boasts a pristine chassis with a precise 6-speed manual transmission and factory-spec limited-slip differential. Mechanically flawless, the vehicle has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance, including rod bearing and throttle actuator service. The suspension retains its factory-fresh damping characteristics with zero bushing deflection. Presented in showroom condition with original paint depth and an interior devoid of bolster wear, this vehicle offers the mechanical purity and tactile feedback of a true driver’s machine.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

This is an exceptional example of automotive excellence, maintained to a standard rarely seen on the secondary market. The exterior retains its original showroom luster, with a deep, mirror-like finish free of any swirls, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin feels untouched; the premium leather remains supple and fragrant, with every electronic component and convenience feature functioning exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, having been stored in a climate-controlled environment and serviced exclusively by certified technicians with a full, documented history included. From the pristine engine bay to the unmarked alloy wheels wrapped in fresh, high-performance rubber, this car represents the pinnacle of its class. It is, quite simply, indistinguishable from new.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. With its flawless finish and mechanical integrity, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking unparalleled refinement and an investment-grade driving experience.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a level of care that satisfies the most discerning automotive enthusiast. An investment-grade acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total stunner! This beauty is in truly mint condition—I’ve babied it since the day I got it, so it looks and feels just like it did on the showroom floor. No scratches, no spills, just pure perfection. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. You won't find another one this clean, so come say hi and take a look!

Offered is a museum-grade 2004 Honda S2000 (AP2), presenting in showroom condition with all 10 matching VIN tags. The high-revving F22C1 inline-four remains factory-sealed, delivering linear power through a crisp 6-speed close-ratio gearbox to a Torsen limited-slip differential. The chassis integrity is absolute, featuring original double-wishbone suspension geometry and unblemished underbody components. VTEC engagement is sharp and immediate, indicative of meticulous maintenance and optimal valve clearances. This example retains its original finish with no paint correction required, sitting on factory-spec Bridgestone Potenza rubber. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a mechanically flawless, analog driving machine with zero deferred maintenance.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Interior like new. Full service history. No mechanical issues.
Presented in breathtaking, showroom-fresh condition, this 2019 sports coupe is a true collector’s gem. The exterior paint retains

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants the highest consideration. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in pristine condition, boasting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in showroom state. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is an investment-grade offering for the discerning enthusiast who demands absolute excellence.
